title: Missing podman plugin in sosreport
body:
> /kind feature

**Description**

sosreport doesn't have a plugin for podman, like we have for [docker](https://github.com/sosreport/sos/blob/db7a86e64c7b6e35f3752974381b52be05dd712d/sos/plugins/docker.py).
It would be essential to have the plugin to support and debug podman in the future.

comments.body: I think this issue is better placed in the sos project (https://github.com/sosreport/sos) as the plugin must be implemented there. I am therefore closing the issue, but please reopen if you think differently.
Yes @EmilienM Please open this in https://github.com/sosreport/sos
